name: Kaijin
description: Kaijin was a blacksmith of the Dwarven Kingdom, and the brother of Kaidou. After he was exiled from his own country, he became Rimuru Tempest's subordinate, and helped build the Monster City "Tempest", he acted as a builder, blacksmith, and craftsmen. He also was the former commander of the Dwargon Engineering Corps. (Source: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken Wikia)

name: Kii
description: __Species:__ Dryad Kii is a Dryad rescued from an illegal Monster trafficking operation. When Papi found her, she named her Kii, since Papi stated "she looks like a tree," she made friends with Papi when she rescued her, and planted her in the illegal waste dump. (Source: Daily Life With A Monster Girl Wikia)

name: Kiyomi Takada
description: Kiyomi Takada is the former college classmate and girlfriend of Light Yagami who later becomes Kira's spokeswoman on the NHN television station.

name: Konatsu Amano
description: She's a high school first-year student who transfered into Nanahama High School. While she was having trouble blending in with those around her, she met Koyuki, the sole member of the Aquarium Club and later joined the club.

name: Kotetsu Hagane
description: Kotetsu Hagane is a Chunin from Konohagakure. He spends most of the time with his partner Izumo Kamizuki watching who enters and leaves at Konohagakure's Main Gate.

name: Kukai Souma
description: **Guardian Chara:** Daichi The upbeat and energetic former Jack's Chair, he is one year senior to Amu. As the captain of the Soccer Club, he is athletic and has good reflexes. He has graduated, which is the reason he has been replaced. Once, in the school magazine, he and Amu are mistaken to be a couple, as a student got a picture of him holding Amu after she came out of her Character Change, and lost her strength. Saaya appears to have a crush on him, as when she saw the picture of him with Amu

name: Kumi Mashiba
description: Kumi is Ryo Mashiba's sweet-natured, but hard-working and willful younger sister, and as such understands him better than anyone else. She will do almost anything to support her brother and make him happy, including going to his matches even though she doesn't like to see him get hurt. Ippo becomes infatuated with her early on, but didn't have a chance to tell her until more than a year later, when they met in an hospital as patient and nurse some months after the Ippo/Mashiba ring. name: Lilishka
description: [Shintarou's](https://anilist.co/character/316296/) classmate who works at a maid cafe. She is a full-on vampire who wears an eyepatch, bandage, and colored contact lenses. She likes Shintarou's "scent" and tries to "hook up" him whenever she gets a chance. Her real name is Sayuri Kagami. She belongs to the occult research club.

Unlike her Earth Land counterpart, Lucy Ashley has a vulgar and aggressive personality. She's also quite the Tsundere and cares for her guild a lot. name: Mahiru Seki
description: Mahiru Seki is a former middle school student and a childhood friend of [Kou Yamori](https://anilist.co/character/168866/Kou-Yamori) and [Akira Asai](https://anilist.co/character/175663/Akira-Asai). ~!Died with [Kiku Hoshimi](https://anilist.co/character/269128/Kiku-Hoshimi) at the sunrise after she turned him into a vampire!~

name: Mashiro Komiyama
description: Her personality is bright and friendly, yet she is a frail person who needs to rest in the infirmary whenever she feels ill. She isn't particularly good at studying. She knows that people are worried about her health and she does her best to handle things on her own despite having a weak body. Her parents are her only family members.

name: Matsuri Makabe
description: A student in class 2A at CITY South Middle School. She is close friends with [Eri](https://anilist.co/character/180155/Eri-Amakazari) and the younger sister of [Tatewaku.](https://anilist.co/character/180033/Tatewaku-Makabe)

name: Megatron
description: The leader of Destron (aka Decepticon) forces - a cruel and intelligent strategist who dreams of galaxy-wide dominance with what he describes as "peace through tyranny". His signature alternate mode is a customized handgun, often wielded by his subordinates, most commonly [Starscream](https://anilist.co/character/3913/Starscream). However, in later installments, he adapts a number of other alternate modes, with his second most iconic form being a tank. His signature weapon is the **Fusion Cannon

name: Mikoto Shiratori
description: Mikoto Shiratori is the newest member of Sunlight Beverage's corporate badminton team as well as its newest and youngest salesman. He is the tactician and front player of the doubles pair consisting of himself and Tatsuru Miyazumi.

name: Nadie
description: A maverick female bounty hunter and a top marksman, she carries an old Colt Government Model .45 pistol as her weapon of choice. She holds an optimistic attitude but in actuality, Nadie was the sole survivor of an attack on her hometown. Working for Hayward, Nadie accompanies Ellis on her journey. Before killing her opponents, Nadie has a habit of saying, "If you have any last words, say them now".

name: Nagi Yoshino
description: __Species:__ Human Nagi Yoshino is the mother of Junpei Yoshino. Nagi is a friendly, laid-back woman who cared deeply for her son. She's eager for him to make friends and took a liking to Yuji immediately. As a mother, she has some irresponsible tendencies. She was a smoker and drinker who allowed Junpei to skip school if she wished. Nagi believes that her son could take a different avenue other than education to be successful in life. After just one meeting, Yuji recognized that Junpei's mother

name: Naked Snake
nativeName: ネイキッド・スネーク
description: __Height:__ 180-192 cm Naked Snake, real name John, also known as Jack and later known as Big Boss, is one of the four main protagonists of the Metal Gear series. He is a renowned special forces operative and mercenary commander. He founded U.S. Army Special Forces Unit FOXHOUND, along with the mercenary company Militaires Sans Frontières. ~!He was one of the founding members of the Patriots.!~

description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") A first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and is the bassist of the band Morfonica. A somewhat peculiar girl who longs to be normal. She worries about standing out and hides her true self in order to blend in. (Source: Official Site)
